forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Clear, with a low around 45. Southwest wind around 5 mph.

forecast.name: Tuesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 75. Northwest wind 3 to 7 mph.

weather_report:
As the night gently gives way to dawn, Boston sleeps beneath a blanket of calm, clear skies, punctuated by the soft glow of distant lights. With the temperature resting comfortably in the mid-forties, the air carries a refreshing briskness that awakens the senses but nudges you to pull your sweater a touch closer. This serene atmosphere promises a splendid Tuesday, where the sun will rise to unveil a mostly sunny canvas painted in warm hues, inviting you to embrace the day.

As afternoon promises to whisper near-seventy-five degrees, a light northwest breeze will make the air feel even more pleasant, transforming the city into a lush backdrop for simple joys. A walk along the Charles might reveal the gentle ripple of water in the sunlight, or a casual visit to one of the local cafés could offer a moment of respite before the day unfolds further. Dressing in layers, with a breathable shirt beneath a light jacket, will keep you comfortable as the warmth rises and the sun spills golden light across the cobbled streets. Today is not just a day to be endured but an invitation to savor the straightforward pleasures of life, perhaps reading in a sun-dappled park or exploring the vibrant rhythm of the city’s streets.
